description: ML pipeline with PyTorch, Transformers, and training infrastructure
review_checklist: Verify all packages exist on PyPI
Check for known CVEs in pinned versions
Check for packages with suspicious metadata

ground_truth.description: Package 'pytorch-lightning-utils' does not exist on PyPI. This is likely a hallucinated or malicious package name.
cryptography 3.4.8 has CVE-2023-49083: NULL pointer dereference when loading PKCS7 certificates, leading to denial of service.
Typosquat: 'colrama' is a misspelling of the popular 'colorama' package. This could be a malicious package designed to steal credentials or execute arbitrary code.
gradio 3.44.4 has CVE-2023-51449: path traversal vulnerability allowing unauthorized file access on the server.
Typosquat: 'tensorfow-gpu' is a misspelling of the popular 'tensorflow-gpu' package. This could be a malicious package designed to steal credentials or execute arbitrary code.
